evidence.source_title: Walsh Iran-Contra Report — Part I: The Underlying Facts
evidence.description: Hassan Karoubi met with Ghorbanifar and Michael Ledeen in Geneva in late October 1985, proposing a staggered exchange of hostages for Hawk, Sidewinder, and Phoenix missiles.

editorial_notes: Met Ledeen and Ghorbanifar in Geneva c. 27 October 1985. Proposed hostage-for-missile exchange.
